name: Scallops Baked
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup green onions and tops, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse scallops with cold water to remove any remaining shells.
2. Combine scallops, cracker crumbs, butter, catsup, sugar, and pepper in a casserole dish.
3. In another bowl, combine green onions and butter; spread on top of the scallop mixture.
4. Bake in a moderate oven at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Sprinkle with paprika.
